summary: Planned conservative, non-mutating classifications for the live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, close/fix/merge actions are disabled, and the hydrated artifact shows all listed PRs should remain open for maintainer or author follow-up rather than automated closeout.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with current proof but unresolved review/author follow-up, so automation should not close or merge it.
Standalone open PR with proof and green relevant checks; not closable under this inventory job.
Potentially useful focused PR, but proof/check status prevents any stronger action.
Keep open as a related focused PR rather than closing; merge readiness is unresolved.
Useful but not merge-ready; unresolved review-bot findings and proof failure require follow-up outside this close-only inventory run.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up; there is unique focused work but unresolved proof/review blockers.
Keep open because it is focused and potentially useful, but proof/rebase/review findings block stronger action.
Maintainer/release-automation judgment is required, and a requested reviewer is present.
Standalone open PR with proof and green checks; not eligible for automated closeout in this job.
Active maintainer signal plus unresolved technical correctness, failing checks, and review-bot findings require human follow-up.
